summary.component_risk_status: No-op is guarded by charged sjkl.bin plus SJKL_REQUIRE_APPLIED strict runtime, but PR75 component response remains unmeasured and cannot be inferred from C067.
summary.sub314_assessment: No built SJ-KL stack warrants immediate T4 exact eval for sub-0.314: the best byte candidate still needs about 0.001750 component-score gain after rate, while exact T4 C067 q6 SJ-KL showed only about 0.000003 gain and scored worse overall.
